message:
chore(beads): file anftup + updatg + keystr from cycles 2-3

Direct JSONL append (br create hanging this session):

- anftup [HIGH]   add_nodes_from unpacks hashable 2-tuples (fixed in 923177e)
- updatg [HIGH]   Graph.update(Graph) crashes (fixed in 923177e)
- keystr [MEDIUM] KeyError on missing graph key stringifies key — queued
                  for Rust-side fix (PyO3 bindings convert key via
                  format!() before raising; should pass key object
                  directly to PyKeyError).
